timings.weekends: Every 30 minutes, from 08:30 AM to 08:00 PM

Every 15 minutes, from 08:00 AM to 06:00 PM

building_directions.Central Library: Located at the heart of the campus, directly opposite the Admin Block. Walk past the central fountain and enter through the glass double doors.
building_directions.CS Block: Located in Block B, next to the Science Department. Take the walkway behind the Central Library and look for the yellow brick building on your left.
building_directions.VLSI Research Block: Located in Block E. Head south from the main courtyard, pass the Engineering Workshops, and it's the 4-story silver-cladded research building.
building_directions.Main Seminar Hall: Located on the 2nd floor of Block A (Admin Block). Take the central elevators up from the reception desk.
building_directions.Sports Stadium: Located on the far eastern boundary of the campus. Follow the main perimeter road east, past the hostel complex.
